events.title: 200 Hour Yoga Teacher Training Course
events.venue: Om Shanti Om Yoga Ashram
events.description: 25-day Yoga Alliance registered certification program featuring Hatha, Ashtanga, pranayama, meditation, philosophy, and teaching methodology in Himalayan ashram setting.
events.full_text:
Become a Certified Yoga Teacher in the Yoga Capital of the World — Rishikesh, India

Transform your passion for yoga into a life-changing journey with the 200 Hour Yoga Teacher Training Course at Om Shanti Om Yoga Ashram.

As a Yoga Alliance Registered Yoga School (RYS), our internationally recognized certification allows you to become eligible for registration as a Registered Yoga Teacher (RYT) and teach yoga worldwide.

Why Choose Om Shanti Om Yoga Ashram?
Nestled in the serene foothills of the Himalayas and close to the sacred River Ganga, our ashram offers an authentic yogic lifestyle where yoga is not just physical exercise—it is a path of self-discovery, inner peace, and transformation.

25 Days & 25 Nights of Authentic Yogic Living
✔️ Hatha Yoga & Ashtanga Yoga
✔️ Pranayama & Meditation
✔️ Yoga Philosophy & Mantra Chanting
✔️ Alignment, Adjustment & Teaching Methodology
✔️ Yogic Cleansing (Shatkarma) & Spiritual Practices
✔️ Experienced Teachers & Personal Guidance

Upcoming 200 Hour TTC Dates:
01 Jun – 26 Jun 2026
05 Jul – 30 Jul 2026
02 Aug – 27 Aug 2026
05 Sep – 30 Sep 2026

Discover your true potential, deepen your practice, and gain the confidence to share yoga with the world.

Contact:
📞 Call/WhatsApp: +91-8979735058
📧 Email: omshantiomyoga5@gmail.com
🌐 Website: www.omshantiomyoga.com

Your journey toward self-awareness, discipline, and transformation begins here in Rishikesh.

events.title: OSHO Mystic Rose
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort
events.description: 21-day meditative therapy combining laughter, tears, and silence. 7 days of 3-hour daily laughter, 7 days of crying, 7 days of silent sitting.
events.full_text:
Some experiences change you forever. OSHO Mystic Rose is one of them — 21 days of laughing, crying, and sitting silently until everything heavy inside finally lets go.

WHAT IS OSHO MYSTIC ROSE?
Laughter, Tears, and Silence.

For 21 days:
🌹 Laugh for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Cry for 3 hours a day, for 7 days
🌹 Sit silently for 3 hours a day, for 7 days

WHEN DOES IT START AND HOW CAN I PARTICIPATE?
OSHO Mystic Rose starts on the 11th of every month at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Whether you're in the Living-In program or joining from outside the Meditation Resort — the door is open.

👉 More information: https://bit.ly/Join-OSHO-Mystic-Rose

Been through Mystic Rose before? Come back deeper, or simply to refresh. As a gesture of support, returning participants are invited again with a 50% contribution.

"The first thing to be done is laughter, because that sets the trend for the whole day. If you wake up laughing, you will soon begin to feel how absurd life is. Nothing is serious: even your disappointments are laughable, even your pain is laughable, even you are laughable."
Osho, Vedanta: Seven Steps to Samadhi, #1

#OSHOMysticRose #MeditativeTherapy #LaughterAndTears #OshoInternationalMeditationResort #MeditationRetreat

events.title: OSHO Mystic Rose Meditation
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort
events.description: 21-day meditation journey with three weeks of laughter, crying, and silence—3 hours daily each phase. Release past patterns and reconnect with authentic self.
events.full_text:
OSHO Mystic Rose Meditation is a 21-day journey that releases what you've been carrying:

Week 1: Laugh for 3 hours daily
Week 2: Cry for 3 hours daily
Week 3: Sit in silence for 3 hours daily

No talking. No analysis. No therapy sessions.
Just pure expression that dissolves the scars of the past and reconnects you with who you really are.

OSHO Mystic Rose Meditation happens every month starting on the 11th.

Learn more: https://bit.ly/OSHO-MysticRose

"I have invented many meditations, but perhaps this will be the most essential and fundamental one." – Osho

events.title: OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Unlock unconscious power to support meditation and transformation.
events.full_text:
OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days

Unlock the power of your unconscious to support your meditation and transformation. In this 7-day early morning course (7:30 - 8:30 am daily), you will be gently guided into the art of self-hypnosis – a powerful gateway to deep relaxation and transformation. Through subtle shifts in awareness and intention, you will access the vast, hidden resources of your unconscious and learn how to plant seeds of clarity and change. As your unconscious becomes an ally, meditation blossoms effortlessly. Trust deepens, relaxation arises naturally, and insight unfolds without struggle.

"The secret of hypnosis is that it takes you to the unconscious, and then you can put the seed of anything in the unconscious, and it will grow, blossom. The blossoming will happen in the conscious, but the roots will remain in the unconscious." – Osho

Jul 12 - 18, 2026 ~ with Richa

events.title: OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation
events.venue: Online
events.description: One-week live online course exploring self-hypnosis and meditation for inner change. 1 hour daily sessions working with the unconscious mind.
events.full_text:
Can hypnosis shift what trying never could? 🌿

Sometimes the more effort we make to change, the more deeply old patterns hold on.

OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation explores a different approach—working with the unconscious mind, where many of our habits, beliefs, and responses are rooted. Through self-hypnosis and meditation, this live online course supports a gentler, more natural way of creating inner change. ✨

A practical one-week journey into relaxation, awareness, and the untapped intelligence of the unconscious.

🗓️ July 13th – 19th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 1 week • 1 hour a day
FREE PREVIEW: July 6th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "HYPNOSIS" in the comments and receive the details via DM 👇🏻

"For spiritual growth I don't think there is anything more important than hypnosis."
Osho, Beyond Psychology, 44

OSHO ZEN TAROT TRAINING

Learn the Art of Conscious Card Reading

The Osho Zen Tarot is not about predicting the future. It is a mirror that reflects your present moment, helping you uncover deeper awareness, clarity, and insight.

Through meditation, intuition, and the wisdom of the cards, learn to read beyond symbols and discover a compassionate approach to understanding yourself and supporting others.

Dates: 16–19 July, 2026
Venue: Zorba the Buddha, New Delhi (or Online via video call)

Interested? WhatsApp us at 📞 9311958352 or comment "Tarot" to know more.

events.title: Living Joyfully Meditation Workshop
events.venue: OSHO Meditation Center Indore
events.description: Experience stress-free living through Osho's simple meditation techniques. Learn to live in present moment with awareness and transform daily activities into deep joy.
events.full_text:
Living Joyfully Meditation Workshop

An opportunity to experience life from a stress-free dimension. Through Osho's simple and effective methods, we will learn to live in our present moment and transform everyday tasks into awareness and deep joy.

This workshop reminds us that living in joy is our nature—there is no force required for it. Through Osho's insights, we will learn how to let go of the mind's unnecessary thoughts, remain stress-free, and live in the natural state of meditation playfully.

Facilitated by Sw Sanjay Bharti
July 17th, 18th and 19th
At OSHO Meditation Center Indore

events.title: OSHO Born Again
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort
events.description: Seven-day meditative therapy. One hour daily of uninhibited play, dance, singing, crying. One hour of silent sitting. No talking or analyzing. Access buried aspects of childhood.
events.full_text:
OSHO Born Again — remember being a child? For one hour a day, you become one again — dance, jump, sing, cry, be silly. Nothing is off-limits. Then one hour of sitting in silence.

Seven days. No talking, no analyzing. Just what was buried under all that growing up.

A meditative therapy, starting on the 17th of every month at the OSHO International Meditation Resort, Pune, India.

Upcoming dates:
🌹 17–23 July 2026
🌹 17–23 August 2026
https://bit.ly/OSHO-Born-Again

Want to learn to facilitate this course? Come in August:
🌹 17–23 August 2026
✨ Prior participation in an OSHO Born Again course is recommended.

More info: https://bit.ly/OSHO-Born-Again-Facilitating
Booking: https://bit.ly/Living-In-Programs-Overview

"They are trying to enforce their ambitions on the child; that's how conditioning begins. They are not allowing the child to be himself… Happiness happens only when you are authentically yourself."
Osho, Come, Come, Yet Again Come, #3

events.title: OSHO Secrets of Living and Dying
events.description: Live online experiential course on meeting life, loss, and the unknown through meditation. Explore death consciously to enrich presence and openness.
events.full_text:
Are you dying to live? 🌿

Most of us avoid thinking about death.

Yet when we begin to explore it consciously, something unexpected can happen: life becomes richer, more immediate, and more precious.

OSHO Secrets of Living and Dying is a live online course offering an experiential approach to meeting life, loss, and the unknown through meditation. Rather than treating death as something distant, it becomes an invitation to live with greater presence, trust, and openness.

🗓️ July 18th & 19th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • Sat & Sun • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: July 12th, 2026

👉🏻 Write SECRETS in the comments and receive the details via DM 👇🏻

"If just once a person could see what dying is like, what happens in death, then the next time he would have no fear of death because there would be no death."
Osho, And Now and Here, 3

#meditation #osho #awareness #livinganddying #meditationpractice #presence #innerjourney #oshoonline

events.description: Awaken intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot cards.
events.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot - 1 Day
Awaken your intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot
Using OSHO Zen Tarot cards, this is an opportunity to develop our intuition from the perspective of the here and now – the perspective of Zen. Where traditional tarot often looks to the past or tries to predict the future, OSHO Zen Tarot brings us into the present moment. Rooted in the wisdom of Zen, these cards reflect our inner world – our thoughts, feelings, and energies – as they are right now. They become a mirror, helping us to see what we might not yet recognize, and offering insight and clarity without judgment.
"If you have looked meditatively at the Tarot card … And they are cards to be meditated upon; they are old secret methods of meditation." Osho
Jul 18, 2026 ~ with Sadhana

events.title: Osho Self-Hypnosis for Pain Relief & Relaxation – Taster Session
events.venue: Online
events.description: One-hour experiential taster session on self-hypnosis for pain relief and relaxation. Learn guided deep relaxation, self-hypnosis basics, and explore healthier relationship with pain and stress.
events.full_text:
🌿 Osho Self-Hypnosis for Pain Relief & Relaxation – Taster Session 🌿

📅 Date: 18/07/2026
🕖 Time: 07:00 PM – 08:00 PM (IST)

💻 Mode: Online
🪷 Facilitated by: Nirav Advaya

Pain affects not only the body but also the mind and emotions. Through deep relaxation and self-hypnosis, discover a gentle way to cultivate inner peace, reduce stress, and support your natural capacity for healing and well-being.

In this one-hour experiential session, you will:
• Experience a guided deep relaxation.
• Learn the basics of self-hypnosis.
• Explore a healthier relationship with pain and stress.
• Awaken the quiet healing power within.

No previous experience is needed. This session is open to anyone seeking relief from physical or emotional stress, or simply wishing to experience profound relaxation.

🌿 7-Week Online Course Begins

📅 25/07/2026
🕖 07:00 PM – 08:00 PM (IST)

For Registration:
Call: 76763 26889
Email: oshoinbangalore@gmail.com

"The greatest healer is already within you. When the mind becomes silent and relaxed, the body's innate wisdom begins to reveal itself."

This program supports relaxation and emotional well-being. It complements—but does not replace—medical advice or treatment.

🪷 Come as you are... and discover the healing power of deep relaxation.

events.title: Trauma Healing - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Release trauma embedded in nervous system; healing possible.
events.full_text:
Trauma Healing - 1 Day
Beyond trauma – a life of freedom
Are you burdened by feelings of powerlessness? Do you sometimes feel like the victim of forces beyond your control? Do you often feel resentful, anxious, guilty? Do you find you can't trust yourself not to blindly overreact in certain situations? These are the effects of past trauma, embedded in the nervous system, and can be released. Healing is possible.
"Medicine heals the body, meditation heals your soul. But their function is the same – healing." Osho
Jul 19, 2026 ~ with Richa

events.title: OSHO Nothing Was Ever Wrong With You
events.venue: Online
events.description: Five-week online journey exploring self-judgment beliefs through meditation, self-inquiry, and experiential processes.
events.full_text:
Will I ever be enough…? 🌹

For many, that question has been quietly shaping the way of living.

OSHO Nothing Was Ever Wrong With You is a five-week journey into the beliefs we formed about ourselves long ago—and the possibility of meeting ourselves with fresh eyes. Through meditation, self-inquiry, and experiential processes, the course explores what happened before self-judgment became a habit, and what becomes possible when it no longer defines you.

🗓️ July 21st – August 13th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 5 weeks • 8 sessions
Tuesdays & Thursdays • 90 minutes per session
FREE PREVIEW: July 14th, 2026

👉🏻 Write RIGHT in the comments and receive the details via DM 👇🏻

"You are enough unto yourself.
You are the whole universe."
Osho, The Zen Manifesto: Freedom from Oneself, 4

#meditation #osho #awareness #selfacceptance #oshoonline #onlinecourses

events.title: Osho's Mind Meditative Therapy
events.description: Osho-guided mind meditative therapy workshop addressing stress, anxiety, and life challenges through meditation and inner transformation techniques.
events.full_text:
Rajkot
09-2026

Osho's Mind Meditative Therapy

Vadodara-based Swami Rajit Bharati is organizing a special program from 21st to 28th July at Rajkot, featuring Osho's therapeutic meditation techniques. The workshop aims to address modern stress, anxiety, relationship issues, and existential challenges through deep meditative practices and inner awareness.

Key Topics Covered:
- Understanding the mind through Osho's vision
- Meditative approaches to emotional healing
- Breaking patterns of fear and conditioning
- Reconnecting with inner consciousness
- Practical techniques for daily well-being

The program includes interactive sessions, guided meditations, and personal guidance from experienced facilitators trained in Osho's methods. Participants will learn transformative practices applicable to personal growth and spiritual development.

Venue: Rajkot
Dates: 21-28 July 2026
Duration: 8 days

For registration and further details, interested participants are encouraged to contact the organizing committee in Rajkot.

events.title: OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth & Facilitator Training
events.venue: LIVE Online
events.description: Experience OSHO Active Meditations, understand each stage's purpose, and develop facilitator skills to guide others through transformative practice.
events.full_text:
Every day lived with awareness changes something inside you. 🌿

Meditation grows through practice, understanding, and showing up—day after day.

Whether you're beginning your meditation journey or feel called to share these transformative methods with others, there is a path for you.

✨ OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth
Experience the meditations, understand the purpose behind each stage, and build a strong foundation for your own practice.

✨ OSHO Active Meditations In-Depth & Facilitator Training
Deepen your own experience while developing the confidence, clarity, and practical skills to introduce these meditations to others.

Wherever you are today, both journeys begin with the same invitation: to experience meditation for yourself.

🗓️ July 22nd – 28th, 2026

🗓️ FREE PREVIEWS
In-Depth: July 15th, 2026
Facilitator Training: July 16th, 2026

Active Meditations In-Depth
LIVE Online • 1.5 hours a day
👉🏻 Write DEPTH in the comments and receive the details.

Active Meditations In-Depth & Facilitator Training
LIVE Online • 5 hours a day
👉🏻 Write GUIDE in the comments and receive the details.

"Each day lived with awareness becomes a meditation. And when days turn into weeks, and weeks into a month of conscious living — you'll notice something subtle has shifted inside you. That shift is real."
Osho

events.title: Breath of Life - Morning Mini Course
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Reconnect with vital energy through breath and movement.
events.full_text:
Breath of Life - Morning Mini Course
Reconnect with your vital energy through breath, movement, and mindful awareness
This is an invitation to wake up the natural energy that flows through you with every breath – to celebrate your aliveness. Through conscious breathing, joyful movement, and meditative awareness, you will reconnect with the vibrancy that is your true nature. Tensions will melt, emotions will be released, and your life energy will begin to move freely again. Come alive … and then more alive!
"Celebration means dropping this whole trip of becoming – just being here. When becoming disappears, all the smoke of becoming disappears, there is the flame of being, and that very flame is celebration." Osho
Jul 22, 2026 ~ with Devendra

events.title: Monsoon Festival – Osho Meditation Camp, Mount Abu
events.venue: Osho Abu Dham Resort, Peshua Village, Ahmedabad-Delhi Highway
events.description: 3-day Osho meditation camp in monsoon season with meditation, silence, music, and self-experience sessions led by Ma Prem Anjali and Ma Prasannata.
events.full_text:
🌿 MONSOON FESTIVAL – OSHO MEDITATION CAMP, MOUNT ABU 🌿

A golden opportunity to meet yourself amidst cool monsoon showers, green mountains, and a serene atmosphere…

You are invited to a deep, peaceful, and joyful Osho meditation camp.

✨ This special event is organized by Celebrate Life Retreat.

This camp will take you away from the daily rush and connect you with inner peace, love, and awareness.

In the loving presence of Ma Prem Anjali and Ma Prasannata, a journey of meditation, silence, music, and self-experience awaits you.

📍 VENUE:
Osho Abu Dham Resort, Peshua Village, Ahmedabad-Delhi Highway, Rajasthan

👉 This location is approximately 25-30 km from Mount Abu.
You can easily reach Mount Abu by train (Abu Road Station) or bus. From there, it is simple to reach the resort by taxi/auto.

🌧️ SPECIAL ATTRACTIONS IN MONSOON:
During the rainy season, this entire area becomes lush and green. The play of clouds on mountains, cool breeze, and serene atmosphere make it perfect for meditation.

Nearby, you can also enjoy beautiful places like Nakki Lake, Sunset Point, and Dilwara Jain Temple.

🗓️ DATES:
23 July (evening) to 26 July (afternoon)

💰 FEES (3-day full package – accommodation, meals, and all meditation sessions included):
• ₹4,900 per person – Double Sharing
• ₹3,900 per person – Triple Sharing
• ₹2,900 per person – Dormitory

🔸 Registration Fee: ₹1,500 (included in total fee)

📞 CONTACT:
📱 9810672814
📱 097839 08088 (Ashram contact number)

events.full_text:
JOURNEY OF LOVE RETREAT

Sufi Wisdom • Osho Meditations

Love is not something to search for.
It is something to remember.

When the mind becomes quiet, the heart naturally opens. Through Sufi practices, Osho Active Meditations, music, sacred circles, dance, creativity, and deep sharing, we create a space where love is experienced—not as an emotion, but as a way of being.

Come as you are.
Leave lighter, more present, and deeply connected to yourself and others.

• July 24–27, 2026
• Zorba the Buddha, New Delhi
• 9311958352

events.title: OSHOBA The Drum Beat Meditation - 3 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: No-Mind experience of sound, silence, and letting go.
events.full_text:
OSHOBA The Drum Beat Meditation - 3 Days
The No-Mind experience of sound, silence, and letting go
Your heart begins to leap, your energy soars, expands and moves freely as you center yourself and dance with OSHOBA. Through rhythm and stillness, something within you takes flight. This course is an invitation to let go and play music together in a way that feels rare and deeply alive – an experience beyond performance, beyond effort. It is an experiential meditation in precision, discipline, and awareness, where sound and silence become gateways to presence.
"If the drummer is good and really knows how to create an atmosphere through the drumbeat, nobody can be there without being affected. Even a Buddha would like to dance." Osho
Jul 24 - 26, 2026 ~ with Hansa, Nivedano, Punitama

events.title: OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind - 7 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Treat body with gratitude; befriend and trust its intelligence.
events.full_text:
OSHO Reminding Yourself of the Forgotten Language of Talking to Your BodyMind - 7 Days
Treat your body with gratitude and trust, it is your friend and companion
This seven-day course, lasting one hour per day, invites you in deep relaxation to tune into your "bodymind." You will learn to befriend and trust its intelligence, and find new solutions for optimal health, balance, and well-being. The course meets from 7.30 am to 8.30 am over seven days. The process can be continued or refreshed at any time.
"The body is the most complex mechanism in existence – it is simply marvelous. And blessed are those who marvel." Osho
Jul 24 - 30, 2026 ~ with Richa

events.venue: Osho Home Ashram
events.description: Six-day residential meditation retreat exploring Osho's life, vision and meditation science through meditation, music, silence, celebration and satsang.
events.full_text:
🌕 WHO IS OSHO?

Guru Purnima Special Meditation Camp

25–30 July 2026

With Swami Shrila Prem Paras

📍 Osho Home Ashram, Bhedaghat

Awe. Rebellion. Meditation.

Who is Osho?

He can be known through experience, not through books.

This six-day residential camp is an opportunity to understand Osho's life, vision and the science of meditation through meditation, music, silence, celebration and satsang.

Swami Shrila Prem Paras has been guiding thousands of seekers for the past two decades through meditation and music. His approach is based on experience, not on theories.

💮 Contribution: ₹1000, 1300, 2100 per day (for food and ashram maintenance)

🏡 Accommodation: Contribution-based

🚭 Smoking and alcohol not permitted

⚠️ Limited spaces available. Prior registration required.

events.title: Mindfulness and Moving - Mentastics - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Discover alignment, ease, lightness through meditative movement.
events.full_text:
Mindfulness and Moving - Mentastics - 1 Day
Discover alignment, ease, and lightness through meditative movement and breath
Mindfulness and Moving – Mentastics invites you into a gentle exploration of movement and awareness. Through playful, meditative exercises, tension softens and the body's natural rhythm reawakens. Each movement becomes an invitation to experience balance, vitality, and inner spaciousness – a living bridge between motion and stillness, body and meditation.
"The really healthy person is not stuck anywhere, he is not stagnant. He is dynamic. He can be in great action and yet he can remain inactive. He knows the way of wu-wei, he knows the way of action through inaction. You will have to learn that." Osho
Jul 25, 2026 ~ with Satsavya

events.title: A Day for the Heart
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Shift from head to heart; discover presence, love, simplicity.
events.full_text:
A Day for the Heart
Beyond mind, beyond thought – the heart knows
Take a break from the constant nagging of the head with its judgments, criticism, doubts, and fears, and relax into the stillness of the heart. The heart offers a gentle refuge from the overactive mind. In this day of relaxation and reconnection, you will discover how to shift from the head into the heart – where presence, love, and simplicity reside.
"Rather than questioning, you should start moving toward the heart. That is the true rebelliousness, love revolting against logic. And then from love to being is a very simple, very joyful way. It is a garden path full of roses." Osho
Jul 26, 2026 ~ with Sadhana

events.title: Guru Purnima Yatra 2026 with Master Minood
events.venue: Kasaragod & Kannur Temples
events.description: Sacred spiritual journey celebrating Guru Purnima with Master Minood. Includes meditation, silence, devotion, and visits to Shakti and Shiv temples in Kerala.
events.full_text:
🌕 Guru Purnima Yatra 2026🌕
with Master Minood

Join us on a sacred journey to Kasaragod & Kannur, Kerala as we come together to celebrate Guru Purnima in the serene presence of Master Minood.

This special Yatra offers an opportunity to deepen your spiritual practice through silence, meditation, sacred presence with visits to powerful Shakti and Shiv Temples.

📍 Kasaragod & Kannur, Kerala
🛬 Arrival: 27th July, 2026 (Monday)
✈️ Departure: 31st July, 2026 (Friday)

✨ Designed for sincere seekers who wish to nurture their inner journey through contemplation, devotion, and meditation.

If you feel called to be a part of this Yatra, register your interest with us.

Selected participants will then receive further information, including payment details and travel arrangements.

📞 For Enquiries:
9819999301
9619999301
9819999033

Registration Link:
https://forms.gle/TmmVG3eQikqDpZVx5

🙏 Come, celebrate Guru Purnima in an atmosphere of grace, stillness, and spiritual awakening.

Temple of Inner Wisdom
The Light. The Truth.

#templeofinnerwisdom #yatra #gurupurnima2026 #meditation #divineenergy

events.title: Guru Purnima Special Meditation Camp
events.venue: Osho Ashram
events.organizer: Jiwan Jagrati Multiversity, Oshodharma Maitri Sangh, Osho Ashram Sauraha
events.description: Three-day meditation retreat on Guru Purnima with guided sessions by Swami Krishna Premji and team. Open to all. Donation-based fees.
events.full_text:
🕉️ GURU PURNIMA SPECIAL MEDITATION CAMP 🕉️
Osho Ashram, Sauraha

On this sacred occasion of Guru Purnima, we warmly invite you to a three-day meditation camp to deepen your spiritual journey in the presence of Guru energy. Do not miss this rare opportunity 🙏

📅 DATES: Shravan 13–17 (July 29 – August 2)

SCHEDULE:
🔸 Wednesday, Shravan 13, 4:00–6:00 PM: Celebration Program
🔸 Same day, 8:00 PM onwards: Guru Purnima Celebration + Camp Inauguration

⚠️ As Guru Purnima day is special, please register in advance before attending.

🚪 ENTRY: Wednesday, Shravan 13, until 2:00 PM
🏁 CLOSING: Sunday, Shravan 17, 7:00 AM

🙏 FACILITATORS: Swami Krishna Premji and team members

📍 VENUE: Osho Ashram, Sauraha

✅ Open to everyone — beginners and experienced practitioners
✅ No fixed fees — offer a donation according to your capacity on the last day

📞 CONTACT/REGISTRATION:
9843383573
9862345678
9841522443
9851074126

📝 REGISTRATION FORM:
https://oshodharamaitrisangh.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Program-Participants-Registration-Form-OAS.pdf

Jiwan Jagrati Multiversity, Oshodharma Maitri Sangh, Osho Ashram Sauraha

events.title: Celebrating the New Woman - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Rejoice in feminine energies; celebrate being a woman.
events.full_text:
Celebrating the New Woman - 1 Day
Rejoice in your feminine energies, celebrate being a woman
Open the door to the mystic feminine within: dancing in our feminine energies and expressing them freely through movement, we become aware of the joy and freedom they bring to our lives. This gathering of women is a loving and supportive space to explore – and let go of – the ways we have learned to cut ourselves off from our inner richness.
"Rejoice in your feminine qualities, make a poetry of your feminine qualities. That is your great inheritance from nature." Osho
Jul 29, 2026 ~ with Ambu

events.description: Healing retreat to release emotional pain, tension, and reconnect with joy through Tibetan Pulsing technique.
events.full_text:
Glimpses of Tibetan Pulsing 🌿

Unlock your inner energy - a powerful healing journey at Zorba the Buddha.

This isn't just relaxation.

events.title: OSHO Zen Tarot - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Awaken intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot cards.
events.full_text:
OSHO Zen Tarot - 1 Day
Awaken your intuitive insight with OSHO Zen Tarot
Using OSHO Zen Tarot cards, this is an opportunity to develop our intuition from the perspective of the here and now – the perspective of Zen. Where traditional tarot often looks to the past or tries to predict the future, OSHO Zen Tarot brings us into the present moment. Rooted in the wisdom of Zen, these cards reflect our inner world – our thoughts, feelings, and energies – as they are right now. They become a mirror, helping us to see what we might not yet recognize, and offering insight and clarity without judgment.
"If you have looked meditatively at the Tarot card … And they are cards to be meditated upon; they are old secret methods of meditation." Osho
Aug 1, 2026 ~ with Sadhana

events.title: From Sound to Silence and Silence to Song - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Explore inner music; discover dimensions of silence and sound.
events.full_text:
From Sound to Silence and Silence to Song - 1 Day
Exploring your inner music: "the hidden source of treasure in every human heart"
Inspired by insights and meditation techniques from The Voice of Silence, you are invited to discover and experience new dimensions of silence and sound – the ever-present "soundless sound," the basis of all life, and the "song of life," the unique melody found deep within every heart. This course aims to support, enrich, and deepen your experience of meditation and creativity. No previous musical skills or knowledge are needed or required – just yourself and your "hidden source of treasure."
"Listen to the song of life. The first condition for listening is that you begin by listening for it in your heart. Without this, the outer music will not be heard." Osho
Aug 2, 2026 ~ with Satyam

events.title: A Day for the Heart
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Shift from head to heart; discover presence, love, simplicity.
events.full_text:
A Day for the Heart
Beyond mind, beyond thought – the heart knows
Take a break from the constant nagging of the head with its judgments, criticism, doubts, and fears, and relax into the stillness of the heart. The heart offers a gentle refuge from the overactive mind. In this day of relaxation and reconnection, you will discover how to shift from the head into the heart – where presence, love, and simplicity reside.
"Rather than questioning, you should start moving toward the heart. That is the true rebelliousness, love revolting against logic. And then from love to being is a very simple, very joyful way. It is a garden path full of roses." Osho
Aug 6, 2026 ~ with Asmita

events.title: Inner Skills – Living with Totality - 1 Day
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Living with totality is key to happiness and joy.
events.full_text:
Inner Skills – Living with Totality - 1 Day
Living with totality is one of the keys to happiness and joy. But how to be total when there are things to do that we don't enjoy doing – at home, at work, or when we just don't have the energy? In this course we address these issues and discover that being total doesn't have to mean that we end up being workaholics, obsessed with doing.
Aug 7, 2026 ~ with Sneha

Mindfulness and Moving – Mentastics invites you into a gentle exploration of movement and awareness. Through playful, meditative exercises, tension softens and the body's natural rhythm reawakens. Each movement becomes an invitation to experience balance, vitality, and inner spaciousness – a living bridge between motion and stillness, body and meditation.
"The really healthy person is not stuck anywhere, he is not stagnant. He is dynamic. He can be in great action and yet he can remain inactive. He knows the way of wu-wei, he knows the way of action through inaction. You will have to learn that." Osho
Aug 9, 2026 ~ with Satsavya

The Aliveness Blast - Morning Mini Course
Wake up to a new life in The Aliveness Blast!
Expand your energy and enjoy your new life with vitality and the creation of overflowing energy in your body and being. Bring a fresh breath to your life with the new, radiant, vertical full-breath techniques. Come and awaken new energy! Do not let life pass by unlived! Start living right now!

events.title: OSHO Monsoon Festival 2026
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort
events.description: 5-day meditation festival featuring Dynamic Meditation, active meditations, silent sittings, Tai Chi, Chi Gong, therapies, evening meetings, live music concerts, and special night meditations.
events.full_text:
The OSHO Monsoon Festival 2026 is getting closer. 5 days. 100% aliveness.

📅 11 – 15 August 2026

📍 OSHO International Meditation Resort, Pune, India

Where else can you do all of this in one place?

▸ OSHO Dynamic Meditation at 6 AM — the most powerful way to start the day
▸ All day long OSHO Active Meditations in the OSHO Auditorium
▸ Silent sittings in Chuang Tzu — with live music on selected mornings
▸ Morning classes in Buddha Grove — Tai Chi, Chi Gong, Whirling, Zen Archery and dance celebrations
▸ OSHO Meditative Therapies — No-Mind, Born Again, Mystic Rose
▸ OSHO Evening Meeting — every night, the highlight of the day
▸ Live music concerts under the monsoon sky
▸ Special night meditations — OSHO Bardo, Meditations from The Book of Secrets
▸ Meditators Got Talent on the closing night

Over 70 transformative experiences. From sunrise to late night. Meditation, music, monsoon, magic.

No advance registration. No extra charges. Just come — and let the festival do the rest.

Contact: festival@osho.net
Program: https://bit.ly/OSHO-Monsoon-Festival-26

events.title: Opening to Intuition - Morning Mini Course
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Reconnect with intuition through meditation and stillness.
events.full_text:
Opening to Intuition - Morning Mini Course
Trusting your intuition is the way to align with your true self
Through meditation, we begin to reconnect with our intuition – a natural inner wisdom that's always been within us. As we step away from the noise of the conditioned mind, we enter a space of stillness where this quiet voice can be heard once again. In this inner silence, we rediscover our intuitive clarity – a guiding compass that helps us live with authenticity and in alignment with our true essence.
"Intuition is an exalted state needing nothing. It is so full of itself that there is no space for anything else." Osho
Aug 12, 2026 ~ with Nadeen

events.title: OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort, 17 Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra
events.description: Unlock unconscious power to support meditation and transformation.
events.full_text:
OSHO Self-Hypnosis for Meditation - 7 Days
Unlock the power of your unconscious to support your meditation and transformation
In this 7-day early morning course (7:30 - 8:30 am daily), you will be gently guided into the art of self-hypnosis – a powerful gateway to deep relaxation and transformation. Through subtle shifts in awareness and intention, you will access the vast, hidden resources of your unconscious and learn how to plant seeds of clarity and change. As your unconscious becomes an ally, meditation blossoms effortlessly. Trust deepens, relaxation arises naturally, and insight unfolds without struggle.
"The secret of hypnosis is that it takes you to the unconscious, and then you can put the seed of anything in the unconscious, and it will grow, blossom. The blossoming will happen in the conscious, but the roots will remain in the unconscious." Osho
Aug 12 - 18, 2026 ~ with Satsavya

events.title: OSHO Born Again Facilitating Course
events.venue: OSHO International Meditation Resort
events.description: 7-day facilitating course learning to hold space for OSHO Born Again process. Mornings: Born Again process. Afternoons: deepening understanding and facilitation training with Sudheer & Asmita.
events.full_text:
OSHO Born Again Facilitating – the rare chance to learn how to hold a space where others can become children again.

If you've loved the OSHO Born Again process, you already know its power. One hour of being a child again — dancing, singing, jumping, crying, doing whatever you always wanted to do. The second hour of sitting silently, where after total expression, silence arrives all by itself. No forcing. No fighting the mind.

This 7-day Facilitating Course is offered twice a year at the OSHO International Meditation Resort in Pune, India. Mornings are spent in the regular OSHO Born Again process itself. Afternoons are dedicated to deepening your understanding and learning to facilitate this revolutionary process with care, sensitivity, and presence.

📅 Upcoming date:
🌹 17 – 23 August 2026 with Sudheer & Asmita

✨ Prior participation in an OSHO Born Again course is recommended.

More info: https://bit.ly/OSHO-Born-Again-Facilitating
Booking: https://bit.ly/Living-In-Programs-Overview

events.title: Shamanic Healing Retreat
events.venue: Zorba the Buddha
events.description: Four-day retreat featuring Kambo, Sananga, Sweat Lodge, Forest Bathing, and Osho Kundalini Meditation for physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual cleansing.
events.full_text:
SHAMANIC HEALING RETREAT

27–30 August, 2026
Zorba the Buddha, Delhi

Your body is constantly speaking.
Sometimes through vitality.
Sometimes through exhaustion.

When life becomes crowded with stress, noise, emotional weight, and endless doing, the body often asks for something simple: Space.

Space to release.
Space to listen.
Space to reconnect.

For four days, we gather in nature to explore ancient cleansing practices, meditation, silence, movement, and community.

The journey includes:

Kambo
Sananga
Sweat Lodge
Forest Bathing
Osho Kundalini Meditation

Each offering invites a different kind of cleansing—physical, emotional, energetic, and spiritual.

Participants often describe:
• Feeling lighter
• Greater clarity
• Renewed energy
• Deeper connection with themselves
• A sense of inner calm and balance

Testimonial:
"After participating in Shamanic Plant Medicine ceremonies, I feel more peaceful in my mind and stable in my health. It has also helped me control my weight naturally."
- Antas

In the heart of nature, surrounded by trees, birdsong, and conscious community, this retreat becomes an opportunity to step away from the familiar and remember what it feels like to simply be.

Zorba the Buddha • Delhi

events.title: Conscious Sexuality Workshops - Awaken Your G-Spot
events.venue: Humaniversity
events.description: Conscious Sexuality workshop for women focused on awareness, safety, and honest communication around sexuality and healing.
events.full_text:
Conscious Sexuality workshops exist because sexuality is rarely given the space it truly needs. Not a space of advice, technique, or performance, but a space of awareness, safety, and honest meetings and communication.

At Humaniversity, sexuality work has been part of our therapeutic approach for decades. We have seen, again and again, that when sexuality is met with respect, awareness and friendship, it becomes a powerful gateway to healing, sovereignty, and joy.

Awaken Your G-Spot | 5-6 September (for women)
Tantra for Couples | 26-27 September
Free to Be Me | 2-8 October

events.title: Mystic Rose
events.venue: Online
events.description: 21-day meditative therapy with laughter, tears, and silence. 3 hours daily. Week 1: Laughter, Week 2: Tears, Week 3: Silence.
events.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and reserve your place.

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

events.description: 21-day meditative therapy featuring laughter, tears, and silence to dissolve emotional scars through total participation and awareness.
events.full_text:
When was the last time you laughed so totally that thinking disappeared? 🌩️

OSHO called Mystic Rose one of his most essential meditative therapies. Through laughter, tears, and silence, this 21-day process creates the possibility for old emotional scars to dissolve without analysis, discussion, or storytelling — simply through total participation and awareness.

Week 1: Laughter 🌹
Week 2: Tears 🌿
Week 3: Silence ✨

🗓️ September 22nd – October 12th, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Explore the course and reserve your place: https://bit.ly/OSHO-MysticRose-Sep2026

"I am introducing laughter as a meditation because nothing makes you so total as laughter; nothing makes you stop your thinking as laughter does."

Osho, AA-HOO! The Mystic Rose, 21

events.title: India Centennial Celebrations
events.venue: Leonia Holistic Destination
events.description: Spiritual celebration with Worldwide Spiritual Directors Nayaswami Jyotish and Nayaswami Devi. Early bird discount extended till July 15.
events.full_text:
We hope you can use this special opportunity to register for the India Centennial celebrations with our larger spiritual family from India and around the world. We are especially blessed to share this occasion with our Worldwide Spiritual Directors, Nayaswami Jyotish and Nayaswami Devi.

When: Thursday, October 1 - Sunday, October 4
Where: Leonia Holistic Destination, Hyderabad

Early Bird Discount EXTENDED till July 15.

To register visit: https://anandaindia.org/swami-kriyanandas-centennial-celebration/

Watch this message from N. Aditya & Br. Vasudeva: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lF8Jv7Ec9hY

We look forward to celebrating with everyone 🌻✨🌻
Feel free to reach out to us at srw@anandaindia.org OR +91-9822429953

crop_hint.note: Face positioned mid-frame, centered composition preserves text areas

events.title: Swami Kriyananda 100th Birth Anniversary Centennial Celebration
events.description: Centennial celebration of Swami Kriyananda featuring meditation, uplifting talks, sacred music, Kriya renewal, and divine fellowship.
events.full_text:
Join us as we celebrate the 100th Birth Anniversary of Swami Kriyananda, a devoted disciple of Paramhansa Yogananda, whose life continues to inspire countless souls to live with joy, devotion, and God-remembrance.

This Centennial Celebration is more than an event; it's an invitation to deepen your spiritual journey through meditation, uplifting talks, sacred music, Kriya renewal, and the joy of divine fellowship.

📍 Hyderabad
📅 October 1st to 4th

Register now - https://anandaindia.org/swami-kriyanandas-centennial-celebration/

Come celebrate a life dedicated to God and be part of a legacy that continues to awaken hearts around the world. 🙏💙

Organised by Ananda Sangha India.

events.title: Free to Be Me - Sexual Healing Training
events.venue: Humaniversity
events.description: Seven-day sexual healing workshop exploring sexuality with compassion, awareness, and love. Led by Chandrika, supported by Sambodhi and Sunito.
events.full_text:
The Humaniversity Sexual Healing Training is for anyone who wants to explore their sexuality with curiosity, compassion, connection, and love.

The training is led by Chandrika and supported by Sambodhi and Sunito.

The program consists of four seven-day workshops, held twice a year.

The next workshop, Free to Be Me, takes place from 2–8 October 2026. This is followed by Dance of the Lovers in Spring/Summer 2027 and M.O.R.E. in Autumn 2027.

Contact: ☎️ 0031 72 506 4114 | info@humaniversity.nl

events.title: OSHO Mystic Rose
events.venue: Online
events.description: 21-day meditative process for emotional release and inner renewal. Week 1: laughter releases tension. Week 2: tears and conscious emotional expression. Week 3: silence and inner flowering.
events.full_text:
There are tears that have been waiting for years.

"You have suppressed so much sadness, so much despair, so much anxiety, so many tears – they are all there, covering you and destroying your beauty, your grace, your joy." Osho, YA-HOO! The Mystic Rose

OSHO Mystic Rose is a 21-day meditative process designed to support emotional release and inner renewal. After a week of laughter softens old layers of tension, the second week becomes an invitation to welcome tears consciously

Simply as a natural movement of energy that has been waiting to be expressed.
And when laughter and tears have completed their work, silence flowers in the final week. ✨

🗓️ October 14th - November 3rd, 2026
LIVE Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day
FREE PREVIEW: June 24th, 2026

👉🏻 Write "ROSE" to explore the course and discover the full process.

#meditation #osho #awareness #mysticrose #meditativetherapy #emotionalrelease #healingjourney #oshoonline

events.title: Osho Silence Retreat (5 Days)
events.venue: Osho Sanzen, Kotla
events.description: 5-day silent meditation retreat with sunrise meditation, satsang, zazen, and evening energy transmission. Advanced group experiencing silence's spiritual depth naturally.
events.full_text:
Osho Silence Retreat (5 Days)
21 - 25 October 2026
(Opening - 20th October, Evening)
With: Ma Dhyan Abha

---

"Silence is the soul of meditation..."

Osho has said this many times, and not only Osho, but every guru has emphasized this.

This Osho silence retreat will give us this experience - how!
In Osho Sanzen, these 5 days will be of silence. Silence that arises naturally is fruitful, in which the seeker does not have to go through struggle.

Morning sunrise meditation, satsang, silent sitting, bardo, zazen and soothing music will help seekers go deeper with each passing day.
Every evening in satsang, Osho energy will shower on all of us. This is an advanced group.

If you want to experience yourself closely, you are welcome:

Osho Sanzen, Kotla, Solan, HP
088943 51962
(Advance booking)

Osho Sanzen
Kotla, Solan, Himachal
8894351962

events.title: OSHO Mystic Rose
events.venue: Online
events.description: 21-day live online course combining laughter, tears, and silent witnessing for emotional release and conscious awareness.
events.full_text:
OSHO Mystic Rose

Starting November 1st, 2026
Live Online Course • 21 days • 3 hours a day

Course Structure:
- Week 1: Laughter
- Week 2: Tears
- Week 3 (7 days): Silent witnessing and sitting

After emotional release through laughter and tears, enter a space of silent sitting, allowing the freshness that emerges to be experienced consciously. A silence that is alive, spacious, and deeply nourishing.

FREE Preview: June 24th, 2026 - COMES SOON!

To Register:
Write "ROSE" in the comments and receive the details via DM

Quote from Osho:
"Then you know that you are just the quality of reflection, that you are a pure consciousness, a witness, that you are a mirror and nothing else, that you are just a watcher, a watcher on the hill."
- Osho, YA-HOO! The Mystic Rose

events.full_text:
OSHO Meditation Retreat 🌿
(Pure Witnessing Consciousness - 3-Day Celebratory Meditation Retreat)

📅 7 to 10 May

✨ Retreat Highlights:
🔶 Osho Meditation and Powerful Therapy Sessions
🔶 Kundalini Meditation
🔶 Active Meditations
🔶 Silent Meditation on the Ganges Bank
🔶 Sattvic, Nutritious Meals Three Times Daily
🔶 Luxury and Comfortable Accommodation
🔶 Active Meditation at Ganga Ghat

💰 Contribution Amount (for 3 days):
(Includes A/C & Non A/C accommodation, 3 meals daily, and 5 Osho Meditations/Therapy sessions daily)

🔹 A/C Triple Sharing: ₹8,900
🔹 A/C Double Sharing: ₹9,900
🔹 A/C Single Private Room: ₹15,900
🔹 A/C Couple Room: ₹18,900

🔹 Non A/C Triple Sharing: ₹5,900
🔹 Non A/C Double Sharing: ₹6,900
🔹 Non A/C Single Private Room: ₹12,300
🔹 Non A/C Couple Room: ₹15,300

events.description: Full-day meditation journey inspired by Osho's vision. Release suppressed emotions, cleanse tensions, and discover inner ease through curated meditation processes.
events.full_text:
OSHO Colors – An Immersive Meditation Day

Inspired by the vision of Osho, this day is designed as a journey—from activity to stillness, from expression to silence, from chaos to clarity.

In our daily lives, so much remains suppressed—emotions, energy, laughter, tears. Through these carefully curated meditation processes, you will be supported to release, cleanse, and rediscover a deeper sense of ease and aliveness.

This is not just a workshop… it is an opportunity to drop your burdens, to melt your tensions, and to taste a silent, joyful space within.

Date: Sunday, 10th May
Time: 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM
Facilitator: Prem Masto
Contribution: ₹600 (including meals)

Venue: Osho Meditation Center, Indore
328 BC, Kabra House, Near MASC Hospital, Scheme No. 140, Indore

events.title: OSHO Global Meditation Day - OSHO Active Meditations
events.venue: Online
events.description: Full online day of OSHO Active Meditations including Dynamic Meditation, movement, breath, sound, catharsis, and dance practices.
events.full_text:
Dynamic Meditation®️ is for me a masterpiece. 🌩️

👉🏻 Experience OSHO Active Meditations®️ during OSHO Global Meditation Day. Write "MEET" to get the link!

A full online day of OSHO Active Meditations 🌍
🗓️ May 30 – May 31

The first time Sitara tried OSHO Dynamic Meditation®️, she wanted to escape the room! A space full of people breathing, jumping, expressing, releasing… it felt intense.
Beautiful sharing by @prem_sitara

But something changed. ✨

After practicing it for seven days, she fell in love with it. Her body began responding differently — more relaxed, less trapped in tension. What once felt overwhelming became deeply freeing.

That's the essence of OSHO Active Meditations®️.
Unlike traditional approaches that ask you to sit still from the beginning, these meditations involve the whole being. Movement, breath, sound, catharsis, dance — all become doorways into awareness.

They were designed for the modern mind: restless, emotional, full of energy that needs to move before silence can happen naturally.

"Dynamic Meditation for me is a transformative tool." - Sitara

#meditation #osho #awareness #dynamicmeditation #activemeditation globalmeditationday embodiedawareness
